name: Tabular Foundation Models for Discrete Choice Estimation
summary: arXiv:2607.13314v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) generate predictions on structured data via in-context learning, without task-specific estimation. We ask...
description: arXiv:2607.13314v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) generate predictions on structured data via in-context learning, without task-specific estimation. We ask whether TFMs can be effectively applied to discrete choice, a central demand estimation framework in marketing and operations, and find that directly applying TFMs yields limited performance. The gap...
author: Liu Liu, Dan Zhang
